candidates.hook: God could have introduced himself in any way, but he chose to introduce himself as a Creator—and then made us in his image
candidates.payoff: This means every human being, whether naturally creative or not, is a creator made in the likeness of the Creator, capable of reaching into heaven and bringing creative solutions to earth

candidates.hook: You might not be a natural creative, but I am a creator—and that changes everything about what you're capable of
candidates.payoff: The world doesn't care if you're a natural creative; it's looking for creative solutions, and creators made in God's image can provide them

candidates.hook: Someone said there's nothing new under the sun, but here's what they missed: our God does not dwell under the sun
candidates.payoff: Because God doesn't live under the sun, you can reach into the atmosphere of heaven and bring down something the world has never seen before

candidates.hook: This is just a show like any other show unless we connect it to the word of God
candidates.payoff: What differentiates us as people of God is that we are connected to the word and we engage with it—that's what makes this more than entertainment

candidates.hook: Whether you're a natural creative or not, there's a kingdom mandate and identity you can tap into
candidates.payoff: As a creator aligned with kingdom identity, you can bring innovative solutions that the world desperately needs
